providers.title: Marengo Asia Hospitals Faridabad launches proctor enabled robotic surgery program
providers.summary: Marengo Asia Hospitals, Faridabad has launched proctor enabled robotic surgery program to improve access to robotic knee replacement surgery in tier 2 and tier 3 cities.

providers.title: KIMS Hospitals, Brainlab launch South Asia’s first Functional Neurosurgery Reference Centre in Bengaluru

providers.title: Cloudnine's 25% stake sale attracts top global PE firms
providers.summary: The proposed transaction is expected to value Cloudnine at about ₹11,000 crore (around $1.2 billion) and these investors are expected to begin due diligence shortly, with binding bids likely to be submitted by early August, the people said.

providers.title: First state-run bone marrow transplant facility to open at Kolhapur’s CPR Hospital

providers.title: KKR eyes at least $1 billion stake in Medicover's India hospital arm, source says
providers.summary: Sweden's ‌Medicover owns 66.9% of Medicover Hospitals India. KKR is seeking to ​acquire the Swedish ​firm's entire stake for at least $1.05 billion and is also in ⁠discussions with minority shareholders.

providers.title: Manipal Hospitals is said to plan $1 billion IPO in July
